hero.headline: Message any driver. Anywhere. Instantly.
hero.subhead: Type a license plate, send a message. Anonymous, free, and faster than a note on the windshield.

how.title: How it works
how.step1Body: Any car, motorcycle, or trailer — no phone number needed.
how.step2Body: 19 ready messages, from "lights on" to "being towed".
how.step3Body: Push, SMS, or in-app — even if they don't have HOMI yet.

map.title: A live layer for your neighborhood
map.body: Road hazards, tow trucks, parking updates — reported by drivers around you, expiring automatically when they're stale.

fleet.title: Run a fleet?
fleet.body: Plate-based messaging for every vehicle you operate. Under $5/vehicle/month — no hardware, no contracts.

download.title: Be reachable wherever you park
download.body: Free forever for drivers. Tel Aviv first — global soon.

footer.privacy: Sender is anonymous. HOMI never shares phone numbers.
